scripts.get-face-models: powershell -Command "mkdir -Force public/models; cd public/models; Invoke-WebRequest -OutFile tiny_face_detector_model-weights_manifest.json https://raw.githubusercontent.com/justadudewhohacks/face-api.js/master/weights/tiny_face_detector_model-weights_manifest.json; Invoke-WebRequest -OutFile tiny_face_detector_model-shard1.bin https://raw.githubusercontent.com/justadudewhohacks/face-api.js/master/weights/tiny_face_detector_model-shard1.bin; Invoke-WebRequest -OutFile face_landmark_68_model-weights_manifest.json https://raw.githubusercontent.com/justadudewhohacks/face-api.js/master/weights/face_landmark_68_model-weights_manifest.json; Invoke-WebRequest -OutFile face_landmark_68_model-shard1.bin https://raw.githubusercontent.com/justadudewhohacks/face-api.js/master/weights/face_landmark_68_model-shard1.bin"
